page_content:
Special Considerations

Students on approved leave of absence do not have the rights and privileges of registered students, do not have a valid UMD identification card and are not entitled to use university resources, such as the libraries, recreational centers, shuttle buses, and other services covered by mandatory fees. Students seeking information on use of the libraries while on an official leave of absence may find it at: lib.umd.edu/access.

Students must be registered during a semester in which they fulfill a university or departmental degree requirement, such as taking qualifying exams, conducting research, or submitting a dissertation or thesis. In addition, students must be registered to be eligible for any form of university financial aid (e.g. a teaching or research assistantship) and to be certified as full-time students.
